producer.origin: elara-mesh maintainer receipts feed — act 019f4c4f-892f-7702-9ef1-f47289eb91df; assembled from /record/{id}/wire: the signed act record + an epoch seal current at snapshot time (on today's single-zone mesh that is the zone-0 seal; per-act zone resolution lands with multi-zone).
